messages.content: Heyyy Josh. It's ashley, i worked at bannisters for a bit. Its been a while. I've re-gained my passion in the kitchen, for the past year I have been working at a wedding catering company based in Newcastle. I haven't yet started any training or TAFE and i thought that was odd, I was wanting to see if you could give me another chance. I have been speaking to Greg and he told me you opened your own pub so CONGRATULATIONS, on that!
